boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: inspection note used as clearance.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current clearance document and release time match

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact boundary. The controlling control record explicitly states the required dependency is missing or mismatched. Policy requires current source records to close the exact boundary before execution. The inspection note cannot serve as clearance. Do not proceed until the clearance document and release time match.
open_blockers: current clearance document and release time match
